result.reason: The VNC clipboard redirection currently pushes local clipboard changes to the remote server indiscriminately, which can lead to unintended data exposure and unnecessary network traffic.
result.approach: Remove the subscription to FrmMain.ClipboardChanged to prevent automatic pushing of local clipboard content to the remote VNC server.
